name: iEnergizer Ltd. Registered Shar
summary: iEnergizer Ltd. is a global provider of business process outsourcing (BPO) services, specializing in customer service, technical support, and data analytics. The company offers solutions to clients across various industries, including technology, healthcare, and finance, with a focus on improving operational efficiency and customer satisfaction. iEnergizer Ltd. is headquartered in Noida, India.
